title: Crisp Italian Pears Pasta
description: A sweet, crisp Italian dish featuring braised pears and pasta, low-calorie and perfect for showcasing fresh ingredients.

ingredients.name: whole wheat pasta
ingredients.notes: use for a low-calorie, high-fiber base

instructions: Boil 150g whole wheat pasta in salted water until al dente; drain and set aside.
Dice 1 large pear into small cubes; add to a pan with 2 tbsp olive oil and 1 tbsp balsamic vinegar.
Braise the pear cubes over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until tender-crisp.
Add 1 tsp honey and a pinch of salt and black pepper; cook for 2 minutes more, stirring gently.
Mix the braised pears with the drained pasta in a bowl; garnish with extra olive oil and a drizzle of balsamic vinegar.
